criteria.name: simple external baseline learns fixed-pattern task
criteria.note: This catches a broken baseline harness.

criteria.name: CRA has hard-task advantage versus external median
criteria.note: Advantage may be tail accuracy, abs correlation, or recovery versus the external median.

criteria.name: CRA is not dominated on every hard task by best external baseline
criteria.note: Best-external comparison is documented separately; this criterion prevents overclaiming if CRA is broadly dominated.

summary.claim_boundary: Controlled software comparison only; not a hardware result and not proof that CRA wins every metric.
